name: Skorne
description: A disciplined empire from eastern Immoren, forged by conquest, mortitheurgy, ancestral veneration and a pragmatic disregard for pain.
briefing: Skorne commanders rely on brutal discipline, pain-fueled warbeasts and immortalized ancestors preserved in sacral stones. Their armies reward direct pressure, attrition control and precise commitment windows.

armies.name: Exalted
armies.description: An ancestral host centered on immortalized champions, statues, extollers and sacral-stone doctrine.

armies.name: Masters of War
armies.description: A martial formation built around disciplined skorne infantry, tyrants, paingivers and heavy battlefield control.

armies.name: Army of the Western Reaches
armies.description: A western-reaches skorne host combining warbeasts, tyrants, venators, praetorians and battlefield control assets.

name: Cryx
description: The Nightmare Empire of the Scharde Islands, where undead legions, necrotechs and black-iron warjacks serve Toruk the Dragonfather.
briefing: Cryx favors speed, surprise, recursion and necromantic industry. Its forces mix thralls, Satyxis raiders, warwitches and helljacks into an army that punishes unguarded flanks.

armies.name: Dark Host
armies.description: An undead battle line of banes, soul-driven horrors and necromantic command assets.

armies.name: Scourge of the Broken Coast
armies.description: A raiding force of Satyxis, blackships, revenants and coastal terror tactics.
